zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Sutton於1337年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾塞頓時，她的父親John Sutton II30歲，母親Isabel Cherleton30歲。她於大約1366年與Ralph De Staunton在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Sutton于1337年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾塞頓时，她的父亲John Sutton II30岁，母亲Isabel Cherleton30岁。她于大约1366年与Ralph De Staunton在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Sutton was born in 1337, in Sutton, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, John Sutton II, was 30 and her mother, Isabel Cherleton, was 30. She married Ralph De Staunton about 1366, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Sutton est née en 1337, à Sutton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Sutton II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabel Cherleton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph De Staunton environ 1366, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Sutton 1337 in Sutton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Sutton II 30 und ihre Mutter Isabel Cherleton 30. Sie hat um 1366 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph De Staunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Sutton è nata il nel 1337 nel Sutton, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, John Sutton II, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Isabel Cherleton, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Ralph De Staunton circa 1366, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Suttonが1337年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスットオンで生まれた時，父John Sutton IIは30歳，母Isabel Cherletonは30歳であった。約1366年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでRalph De Stauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Sutton(이)가 1337년 영국 노틴그함실르 수턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Sutton II(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Cherleton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1366년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Ralph De Staunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Sutton nasceu em 1337, em Sutton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Sutton II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Cherleton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph De Staunton aproximadamente 1366, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Sutton родилась в 1337 г. в местности суттон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Sutton II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Cherleton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph De Staunton около 1366 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance Sutton nació en 1337, en Sutton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Sutton II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabel Cherleton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Ralph De Staunton aproximadamente 1366, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas.
